---
title: "Margaret Benson"
---

## Margaret Benson

**Dates:** (1865-1916)

### Description

Daughter of the Rt. Rev. Edward White Benson

### Letters

- Letter from June 6th 1890
- Letter from May 9th 1890
- Letter from July 14th 1887
- Letter from April10 th [1883]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
